hero.eyebrow: Primary care internal medicine practice in Bielefeld
hero.body: Contact details, consultation hours and appointment booking at a glance.

summary.hoursValue: Mon-Fri mornings, Mon and Thu also in the afternoon

quick.title: Contact details and opening hours at a glance
quick.phoneHint: Please use the main phone number for appointments and other requests.

contact.title: Contact & directions
contact.openingHoursDescription: Monday to Friday with additional afternoon hours on selected days.

services.title: Services

internalMedicine.title: Internal medicine
internalMedicine.body: Medical care with a focus on internal medicine.

primaryCare.title: Primary care support
primaryCare.body: First point of contact for acute symptoms, chronic conditions and day-to-day primary care.

services.bookingNotice: You will be redirected to the external arzt-direkt booking page.

faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.lead: Short answers to practical questions patients usually have before a visit.
faqPage.sectionBody: The FAQ complements the main navigation and helps reduce repeated calls.

booking.question: How do I book an appointment?
booking.answer: Please use the “Book appointment” button. It takes you directly to the external arzt-direkt booking page.

prescriptions.question: How do I request prescriptions or referrals?
prescriptions.answer: Please use the prescription line. Alternatively, the Arzt-Direkt practice app can be used.

pickup.question: When will a prescription or e-prescription be ready?
pickup.answer: According to the practice notice, collection or e-prescription availability starts on the next working day from 10:00.

houseCalls.question: Does the practice offer home visits?
houseCalls.answer: Yes. According to the posted notice, home visits are only carried out within a 2 km radius of the practice.

languages.question: Which languages are spoken in the practice?
languages.answer: The website is available in German, English, Turkish and Russian. Any languages used during treatment should be separately confirmed before publication.

legalPage.title: Legal notice
legalPage.lead: The legally required details will be added before launch once the final practice data has been verified.
legalPage.sectionBody: The technical page structure is ready, but the legally relevant details are not yet fully confirmed.
legalPage.placeholderOne: Before publication, the responsible entity, professional information, regulatory details and any further required legal content must be checked and entered in full.
legalPage.placeholderTwo: Until this review is complete, this page only serves as a technical placeholder within the project.
legalPage.placeholderThree: This placeholder version must not remain unchanged for the real public launch.

privacyPage.title: Privacy policy
privacyPage.lead: The privacy notice must match the final hosting, external links and technical delivery setup.
privacyPage.sectionBody: The final privacy policy depends on the actual production infrastructure and third-party services used.
privacyPage.placeholderOne: Before launch, hosting, server logs, external map links, the external arzt-direkt booking link and any font or CDN usage should be reviewed.
privacyPage.placeholderTwo: This website intentionally avoids a contact form in order to minimise data collection.
privacyPage.placeholderThree: The final privacy notice should be legally reviewed and completed before publication.
